---
title: "Saccharina latissima"
subtitle: "SL, SLJ"
date: ""
description: "Sugar Kelp/Sea Belt, Lasagna-like blade, <10cm juvenile"
date-format: " "
image: '/header_images/640x427-kelp_sugar_nb_w.jpg'
categories:
  - brown algae
  - kelp
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
catami_code:
worms_code:
---

![](/header_images/640x427-kelp_sugar_nb_w.jpg)

**Other images:** <!-- Other images -->
</br>

**Distinguishing features:** 
</br>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** Can be confused for *Sacchrizia dermatodea*, which has a square stipe. *Saccharina latissima* has a round stipe.

</br>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
